name: supabase
appliesWhen: preferredStack contains 'supabase' OR T-000-discovery locks Supabase as backend

officialRepos.name: supabase/supabase-flutter
officialRepos.why: Official Flutter SDK v2. Auth, Realtime, Storage examples.

officialRepos.name: supabase/supabase-js
officialRepos.why: Official JS/TS SDK v2 for web / Edge clients.

officialRepos.name: supabase/realtime
officialRepos.why: Realtime server source: broadcast / presence / postgres_changes semantics.

officialRepos.name: supabase/cli
officialRepos.why: CLI source. Migration / db reset / edge functions deploy reference.

officialRepos.name: lyqht/awesome-supabase
officialRepos.why: Curated index of starters, plugins, examples by community.
